heading: Partial invalidity
label: 30144 Partial invalidity
text: If any provision of this Act, or the application thereof to any person or circumstance, is held invalid, the validity of the remainder of the Act and the application of such provision to other persons and circumstances shall not be affected thereby.
notes: References in TextThis Act, referred to in text, means the Federal Election Campaign Act of 1971, as defined by .section 30101 of this title
CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Congress, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 454 of Title 2
